data.current_description: Redirect users to this endpoint to initiate the OAuth 2.0 authorization flow.
data.summary_suggestion: Initiate OAuth 2.0 authorization code grant flow
data.description_suggestion: Initiates the OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Grant flow by redirecting the user to the authorization server. Requires client_id, redirect_uri, response_type, and scope parameters. Returns an authorization code via redirect to the specified redirect_uri, which can then be exchanged for an access token using the exchangeToken endpoint. User authentication and consent are required.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks critical details about required parameters, the redirect mechanism, and the relationship to subsequent token exchange. Added specifics about parameter requirements, redirect behavior, and the flow continuation to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this endpoint.

message: Operation 'generateChartImage' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary lacks specificity about the template-based approach. Description is too vague about inputs and outputs. Added details about request/response schemas, authentication requirement, and the persistence of generated images. This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in return.

data.current_description: Generate chart images using customizable templates and data parameters.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate customized chart image from template and data
data.description_suggestion: Generates a chart image by applying customizable data parameters to a selected template. Accepts GenerateImageRequest containing template selection, series data, and chart customization options. Returns a GenerateImageResponse with the generated image URL and metadata. Requires OAuth 2.0 authentication. Generated images are stored and can be retrieved via the returned URL.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about the template-based approach. Description is too vague about inputs and outputs. Added details about request/response schemas, authentication requirement, and the persistence of generated images. This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in return.

data.current_description: Retrieve a list of templates owned by the authenticated user. Every user has a default template with default chart settings.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve user's chart templates including default
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all chart templates owned by the authenticated user. Returns a TemplateListResponse containing an array of Template objects. Every user automatically has a default template with standard chart settings that can be used as a baseline for chart generation. Requires OAuth 2.0 authentication. Templates can be used with the generateChartImage endpoint.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description mentions the default template but lacks clarity about response structure and how templates relate to other operations. Added response schema reference, authentication requirement, and connection to the generateChartImage operation to improve AI agent understanding of template management workflow.
